infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SloanLED needs access to your location to capture GPS coordinates at installation sites.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SloanLED needs camera access to take installation photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SloanLED needs access to your photo library to upload installation photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SloanLED needs microphone access for the voice assistant feature.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SloanLED needs your location to capture GPS coordinates at installation sites.

plugins.photosPermission: SloanLED needs access to your photos to upload installation images.
plugins.cameraPermission: SloanLED needs camera access to take installation photos.
